title: Settings
description: The household's single-row kitchen preferences: who's eating, dietary constraints, tastes, and nutrition goals. One row per pod; getSettings seeds it.

householdSize.description: how many people the plan cooks for; scales plan_meals.servings

diet.description: dietary pattern the plan must honor: 'none' | 'vegetarian' | 'vegan' | 'pescatarian' | 'keto' | …

allergies.description: array of ingredient/allergen name strings the plan must NEVER include (hard filter)

dislikes.description: array of ingredient name strings to avoid where possible (soft filter)

cuisines.description: array of preferred cuisine strings the planner favors

maxPrepMinutes.description: weeknight time cap: prefer recipes at/under this prepMinutes

calorieTarget.description: target calories per person per day, used by the nutrition dashboard

proteinTarget.description: target grams of protein per person per day

notifyChannels.description: array of opted-in reminder/notification channels for weekly wrap + meal reminders, e.g. ['in-app','email','push']; empty/unset means in-app only. External channels degrade gracefully when the gateway integration is unconfigured

updatedAt.description: when the preferences were last changed
